Home / Services / Fence Installation & Repair

Fence Installation & Repair

Protect your property and enhance its curb appeal with our professional fence services.

Secure your property and enhance its aesthetic appeal with a custom fence from Prestige Innovations. We specialize in designing and installing fences that provide security, privacy, and beauty to your home or business. We offer a variety of fencing options, including wood, vinyl, chain-link, and ornamental iron, to suit your style and budget. Our experienced team will work with you to choose the right fence for your needs and ensure a professional installation.

We understand the importance of durability and weather resistance, especially in Oklahoma's climate. That's why we use only high-quality materials and proven construction techniques to ensure that your fence will withstand the elements and provide years of reliable service. We also offer fence repair and maintenance services to keep your existing fence in top condition. Whether you need to repair damaged sections, replace posts, or refinish the surface, we can help.

We handle all aspects of the project, from initial consultation and permitting to final installation and finishing. We also offer a variety of customization options, such as decorative posts, gates, and hardware, to create a fence that reflects your personal style.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and Design – We discuss your needs and create a custom fence design.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection – Choose from a variety of fencing materials and styles.
  3. 03 Step 3: Installation – Our skilled installers build your fence with precision and care.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing Touches – We add the final details to enhance the beauty and functionality of your fence.

Benefits

  • Enhance property security
  • Increase privacy
  • Improve curb appeal
  • Define property boundaries

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of fencing materials do you offer?

We offer a variety of fencing materials, including wood, vinyl, chain-link, and ornamental iron. Each material has its own unique advantages and disadvantages.

How long does it take to install a fence?

The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the fence. We will provide you with a detailed timeline during the consultation phase.

Do you offer fence repair services?

Yes, we offer fence repair and maintenance services to keep your existing fence in top condition. We can repair damaged sections, replace posts, and refinish the surface.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with fence installation & repair? Contact us today.
